title: Shinji and Kaworu Valentine Fair
wikitext: []: Shinji&Kaworu Valentine Fair             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 31, 2013 6:13 pm It looks like the Eva Store organised some Shinji&Kaworu promotions for St. Valentine , if I understand correctly people will receive a postcard if they spend more than 1000 yen. It's weird that the White Day promotion will be about Rei and Asuka, it would have been better if it were about Mari and Asuka.
summary: []: Shinji&Kaworu Valentine Fair             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 31, 2013 6:13 pm It looks like the Eva Store organised some Shinji&Kaworu promotions for St. Valentine , if I understand correctly people will receive a postcard if they spend more than 1000 yen. Article: Shinji and Kaworu Valentine Fair
[]: Shinji&Kaworu Valentine Fair             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jan 31, 2013 6:13 pm It looks like the Eva Store organised some Shinji&Kaworu promotions for St. Valentine , if I understand correctly people will receive a postcard if they spend more than 1000 yen. It's weird that the White Day promotion will be about Rei and Asuka, it would have been better if it were about Mari and Asuka.
